debug_info.goal:
case h
a : Type
p : a → Bool
sl : Chapter3.SymList a
lhs rhs : List a
ok :
  (lhs.isEmpty = true → rhs.isEmpty = true ∨ rhs.length = 1) ∧
    (rhs.isEmpty = true → lhs.isEmpty = true ∨ lhs.length = 1)
⊢ dropWhile p (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) =
    Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.dropWhileSL a p (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok))

| case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    unfold dropWhileSL
    simp [h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst h_none

· simp at h_head; subst h_head

simp at h_len; obtain ⟨a, rfl⟩ := List.length_eq_one.mp h_len

have : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      unfold headSL at h_head; unfold fromSL
      split at h_head <;> simp_all
    cases fromSL sl <;> simp_all

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p
  case case1 sl h_empty =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_empty]
    have : isEmpty sl := by simp [isEmpty, h_empty]
    rw [sl_empty_l_empty sl this]
    simp [dropWhile, fromSL, nil]
  case case2 sl h_not_empty h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none; subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  case case3 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_some, h_p]
    rw [← ih]
    have h_tail_eq : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        induction ys with
        | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
        | cons b bs ih =>
          simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
          simp at ok
          have ok' : (b :: bs).length = 1 := by simp at ok; have := ok.1; simp at this; exact this
          simp [ok', List.reverse_cons, fromSL, nil]
      | cons a as =>
        induction ys with
        | nil =>
          by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        | cons b bs ih =>
          by_cases h: as = []
          . simp [h, List.tail, fromSL] at ih
            simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
          . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
    rw [h_tail_eq]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL] at h_some
      simp [fromSL]
      cases xs <;> cases ys <;> simp at h_some ⊢ <;> try assumption
      contradiction
    cases h_l : fromSL sl with
    | nil => rw [h_l] at h_head; contradiction
    | cons z zs =>
      rw [h_l] at h_head; simp at h_head; subst z
      simp [dropWhile, h_p]
  case case4 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_not_p =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_some, h_not_p]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL] at h_some
      simp [fromSL]
      cases xs <;> cases ys <;> simp at h_some ⊢ <;> try assumption
      contradiction
    cases h_l : fromSL sl with
    | nil => rw [h_l] at h_head; contradiction
    | cons z zs =>
      rw [h_l] at h_head; simp at h_head; subst z
      simp [dropWhile, h_not_p]

| case4 sl h_ne x h_some h_p =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, h_p]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
       unfold headSL at h_some; unfold fromSL
       split at h_some <;> simp_all
       rcases sl with ⟨_, _, ok⟩; simp_all; simp [ok.1]
    match h : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h] at h_head; contradiction
    | y :: ys =>
      rw [h] at h_head; simp at h_head; subst x
      simp [dropWhile, h_p]

| case4 sl h_ne hsl h_some hp =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, hp]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl with | mk l r ok =>
      unfold headSL at h_some; unfold fromSL
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
      · simp at ok; rw [ok.1 rfl]; simp
      · simp
    cases h : fromSL sl
    · rw [h] at this; contradiction
    · rw [h] at this; simp at this; subst hd
      simp [dropWhile, hp]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p <;> rename_i sl h1
  · simp [dropWhileSL, h1]
    have : fromSL sl = [] := by
      rcases sl with ⟨l, r, ok⟩
      simp [fromSL]
      rcases h1 with ⟨ha, hb⟩
      simp [ha, hb]
    simp [this, dropWhile]
  · rename_i h2
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h1, h2]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h2
    subst h2
    simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  · rename_i x h2 ih
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h1, h2]
    have h_cons : fromSL sl = x :: fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      rcases sl with ⟨l, r, ok⟩
      unfold headSL at h2
      split at h2 <;> simp at h2
      · contradiction
      · subst h2
        simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
        rcases ok with ⟨ok1, ok2⟩
        simp at ok1
        have : r.length = 1 := ok1 rfl
        cases r <;> simp at this
        subst this; simp [fromSL, nil]
      · subst h2
        simp [fromSL, tailSL]
        split
        · simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo]
        · simp [fromSL]
    split_ifs with hp
    · rw [ih, h_cons, dropWhile, if_pos hp]
    · rw [h_cons, dropWhile, if_neg hp]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_pos h_empty]
    rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
    simp at h_empty
    simp [fromSL, h_empty]
    rfl
  | case2 sl h_not_empty h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty]
    simp [h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst h_none
    simp at h_not_empty
  | case3 sl h_not_empty h_some hsl heq hp ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty]
    simp [heq, hp]
    rw [← ih]
    congr 1
    rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
    unfold fromSL headSL tailSL at *
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      simp at heq; subst heq
      cases rhs with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons y ys =>
        simp
        have : ys = [] := by
          specialize ok.1 rfl
          simp at ok
          cases ok with | inl h => simp at h; contradiction | inr h => simp at h; exact h
        subst this
        simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo, List.take_append_drop]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at heq; subst heq
      simp
      by_cases hx : xs = []
      . subst hx
        simp
        simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
        generalize rhs.reverse = L
        simp [List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo, List.take_append_drop]
      . simp [hx]
        have : (x :: xs).length = 1 ↔ False := by simp; intro h; rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h; contradiction
        simp [this]
  | case4 sl h_not_empty h_some hsl heq hnp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty]
    simp [heq, hnp]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
       rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
       unfold fromSL headSL at *
       cases lhs <;> cases rhs <;> simp at *
       . contradiction
       . case nil.cons y ys =>
         subst heq
         specialize ok.1 rfl
         simp at ok
         rcases ok with h|h <;> simp at h <;> subst h <;> simp
       . case cons.nil x xs => subst heq; simp
       . case cons.cons x xs y ys => subst heq; simp
    cases h : fromSL sl with
    | nil => rw [h] at this; contradiction
    | cons z zs =>
      rw [h] at this; simp at this; subst this
      simp [dropWhile, hnp, h]

cases lhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢
      · cases rhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢; exact h_some
      · exact h_some
    cases h_cons : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at h_head
    | cons y ys =>
      simp at h_head; subst h_head
      simp [dropWhile, hnp]

· cases xs <;> try contradiction; simp [fromSL]
    have h_hd : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      unfold headSL at h; split at h <;> simp_all [fromSL]
      · rename_i h'; simp [h']
      · rename_i h'; cases xs <;> simp at h'; simp [h']
    rw [h_tail]
    cases h_eq : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [h_eq] at h_hd
    | cons y ys => simp [h_eq] at h_hd; subst y; simp [dropWhile, hp]
  case case4 sl _ x h hp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h, hp]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      unfold headSL at h; split at h <;> simp_all [fromSL]
      · rename_i h'; simp [h']
      · rename_i h'; cases xs <;> simp at h'; simp [h']
    cases h_eq : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [h_eq] at this
    | cons y ys => simp [h_eq] at this; subst y; simp [dropWhile, hp]

| case4 sl h_ne x h_some hnp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_ne, h_some]
    simp [hnp]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
       obtain ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
       unfold headSL at h_some
       split at h_some <;> simp at h_some
       . contradiction
       . rename_i ys; subst h_some
         simp [fromSL]
         simp at ok; have := ok.1 rfl
         rcases this with _ | h; contradiction
         rw [List.length_eq_one] at h; rcases h with ⟨_, h⟩; rw [h]; simp
       . rename_i a as; subst h_some; simp [fromSL]
    match h_fr : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h_fr] at h_head; contradiction
    | y :: ys => rw [h_fr] at h_head; simp at h_head; subst h_head; simp [List.dropWhile, hnp]

rw [←head_eq] at h_some
    cases hf : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hf] at h_some
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [hf] at h_some
      subst x
      rw [dropWhile, if_neg h_np]
  | case4 sl h_ne h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [SymList.dropWhileSL]
    simp [h_ne, h_some, h_p]
    rw [←ih, tail_eq, ←head_eq]
    simp at h_some
    cases hf : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hf] at h_some
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [hf] at h_some
      subst x
      rw [dropWhile, if_pos h_p, hf]
      rfl

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_pos h]
    have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    simp at h
    simp [fromSL, nil, h.1, h.2]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none; subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil]
  | case3 sl h_ne hsl h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_ne, h_some, if_pos h_p, ←ih]
    congr 1
    have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    simp [headSL] at h_some
    simp [tailSL, fromSL]
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      cases rhs with | nil => contradiction | cons y ys =>
      simp at h_some; subst y; simp
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at h_some; subst x; simp
      split
      · simp [splitInTwoSL]
      · rfl
  | case4 sl h_ne hsl h_some h_np =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_ne, h_some, if_neg h_np]
    have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    simp [headSL] at h_some
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      cases rhs with | nil => contradiction | cons y ys =>
      simp at h_some; subst y; simp [fromSL, dropWhile, h_np]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at h_some; subst x; simp [fromSL, dropWhile, h_np]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty, sl_empty_l_empty sl (by simp [isEmpty, h_empty]), fromSL, nil, Chapter1.dropWhile]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none; subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil, Chapter1.dropWhile]
  | case3 sl h_ne hsl h_some hp ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_ne, h_some, hp, ← ih]
    have : fromSL sl = hsl :: fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      obtain ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
      unfold fromSL headSL tailSL at *
      cases lhs with
      | nil =>
        cases rhs with | nil => contradiction | cons y ys =>
        simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp
        simp at ok; have : ys = [] := by cases ok <;> simp_all
        subst this
        simp [splitInTwoSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo, List.take_append_drop]
      | cons x xs =>
        simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp
        cases xs with | nil => simp [splitInTwoSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo, List.take_append_drop] | cons x' xs' => simp
    rw [this]; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hp]
  | case4 sl h_ne hsl h_some hnp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_ne, h_some, hnp]
    obtain ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
    unfold fromSL headSL at *
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      cases rhs with | nil => contradiction | cons y ys =>
      simp at h_some; subst h_some
      simp at ok; have : ys = [] := by cases ok <;> simp_all
      subst this; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hnp]
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at h_some; subst h_some
      simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hnp]

| case3 sl h_head h_p ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_head, h_p, ←ih]
    have h_tail : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r ok; simp [tailSL]
      split_ifs <;> simp [fromSL, splitInTwoSL, *]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r ok
      cases l <;> simp [fromSL, headSL]
      cases r <;> simp [headSL] at h_head ⊢
      simp [h_head]
    cases hf : fromSL sl <;> simp [hf] at this
    · rw [this] at h_head; contradiction
    · rw [this] at h_head; injection h_head with heq; subst heq
      simp [dropWhile, h_p, ←h_tail, hf]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty, fromSL]
    have : sl.lhs = [] ∧ sl.rhs = [] := by simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h_empty; exact h_empty
    have ⟨l, r⟩ := this
    rw [l, r]; simp
  | case2 sl h_not_empty h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_none]
    have : sl = nil := headSL_none_iff_nilSL.mp h_none
    subst this
    simp [fromSL, nil]
  | case3 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_some, h_p, ih.symm]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl with | mk lhs rhs ok =>
      unfold headSL at h_some; unfold fromSL
      cases lhs with
      | nil =>
         simp at h_some
         simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h_not_empty
         simp at ok
         cases rhs with | nil => simp at h_not_empty | cons r rs =>
           cases rs with | nil => simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp | cons _ _ => simp at ok
      | cons l ls => simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp
    have h_tail : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      cases sl with | mk lhs rhs ok =>
      unfold tailSL fromSL; simp
      split
      . rename_i h_l; simp [nil]; rw [List.isEmpty_iff] at h_l; subst h_l; simp at ok
        cases rhs with | nil => simp | cons r rs =>
          cases rs with | nil => simp | cons _ _ => simp at ok
      . rename_i h_l
        split
        . induction rhs generalizing lhs <;> simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
        . simp [List.tail_append]; cases lhs <;> simp_all
    match h : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h] at h_head; contradiction
    | x :: xs =>
      rw [h] at h_head h_tail; simp at h_head h_tail; subst x
      rw [dropWhile, h_tail, h_p]
  | case4 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_p =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h_not_empty, h_some, h_p]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl with | mk lhs rhs ok =>
      unfold headSL at h_some; unfold fromSL
      cases lhs with
      | nil =>
         simp at h_some
         simp [List.isEmpty_iff] at h_not_empty
         simp at ok
         cases rhs with | nil => simp at h_not_empty | cons r rs =>
           cases rs with | nil => simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp | cons _ _ => simp at ok
      | cons l ls => simp at h_some; subst h_some; simp
    match h : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h] at h_head; contradiction
    | x :: xs =>
      rw [h] at h_head; simp at h_head; subst x
      rw [dropWhile, h_p]

have head_eq (sl : SymList a) : headSL sl = (fromSL sl).head? := by
    cases sl with | mk lhs rhs ok =>
    cases lhs
    · cases rhs
      · rfl
      · simp [headSL, fromSL]
        simp at ok; cases ok <;> simp_all
    · simp [headSL, fromSL]

  have tail_eq (sl : SymList a) : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
    have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
    cases xs with
    | nil =>
      induction ys with
      | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
      | cons b bs ih =>
        simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
        simp at ok; have h := ok.1 rfl; simp at h
        cases h <;> simp_all
    | cons a as =>
      induction ys with
      | nil =>
        by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
      | cons b bs ih =>
        by_cases h: as = []
        · simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]

  induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty]
    rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
    simp at h_empty; simp [h_empty.1, h_empty.2, fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl h_ne h_some hsl h_p ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, h_p]
    rw [ih, tail_eq, head_eq]
    rw [head_eq] at h_some
    cases h : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at h_some
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at h_some; subst h_some
      simp [dropWhile, h_p]
  | case4 sl h_ne h_some hsl h_np =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, h_np]
    rw [head_eq] at h_some
    cases h : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at h_some
    | cons x xs =>
      simp at h_some; subst h_some
      simp [dropWhile, h_np]

have h_hd : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
      unfold headSL fromSL at h_head ⊢
      split at h_head <;> simp_all
      . simp [List.head?_append]; split <;> simp_all
      . simp [List.head?_append]; split <;> simp_all
    cases h : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp at h_hd
    | cons y ys =>
      simp at h_hd; subst x
      simp [dropWhile, h_np]

| cons b bs ih =>
             by_cases h: as = []
             . simp [h, List.tail, fromSL] at ih
               simp [h, fromSL, tailSL]
               simp [splitInTwoSL]
             . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
      rw [hks] at tail_eq
      simp at tail_eq
      exact tail_eq

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty, fromSL, nil]
    simp [SymList.isEmpty] at h_empty
    rw [h_empty.1, h_empty.2]
    rfl
  | case2 sl h_not_empty h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty, h_none]
    simp [nil, fromSL]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    rw [h_none, fromSL, nil]
    rfl
  | case3 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty, h_some, if_pos h_p]
    rw [ih]
    have cons_eq : fromSL sl = hsl :: fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      cases sl with | mk l r ok =>
      unfold fromSL headSL tailSL at *
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
      . rename_i h1 h2; simp [h1, h2]; contradiction
      . rename_i h1 y ys h2; rw [h1]; simp
        simp [h1] at ok; cases ok; rename_i o1 o2
        have : r.length = 1 := by cases o1 rfl <;> simp_all
        have : ys = [] := by have := List.length_cons y ys; rw[←h2] at this; rw[this] at *; simp at *; omega
        subst ys; simp [fromSL, nil]
      . rename_i x xs h1; rw [h1]; simp
        split
        . contradiction
        . split
          . rename_i hlen; simp at hlen; subst xs; simp
            simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
            generalize h : r.reverse = L
            simp [List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo]
            rw [List.take_append_drop]
          . simp [fromSL]
    rw [cons_eq]
    unfold dropWhile
    simp [h_p]
  | case4 sl h_not_empty hsl h_some h_not_p =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, if_neg h_not_empty, h_some, if_neg h_not_p]
    have head_eq : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl with | mk l r ok =>
      unfold fromSL headSL at *
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
      . rename_i h1 h2; rw[h1, h2]; simp
      . rename_i h1 y ys h2; rw[h1]; simp;
        simp[h1] at ok; cases ok; rename_i o1 o2;
        have : r.length = 1 := by cases o1 rfl <;> simp_all
        have : ys = [] := by have := List.length_cons y ys; rw[←h2] at this; rw[this] at *; simp at *; omega
        subst ys; simp
      . rename_i x xs h1; rw[h1]; simp
    match h : fromSL sl with
    | [] =>
      rw [←List.head?_eq_none_iff, head_eq] at h
      contradiction
    | x :: xs =>
      rw [List.head?_cons] at head_eq
      injection head_eq with hx
      subst hx
      unfold dropWhile
      simp [h_not_p]

have h_head_eq : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      have ⟨l, r, ok⟩ := sl
      unfold headSL at hx
      unfold fromSL
      split at hx <;> simp_all
      · rw [hx]; simp
      · rw [hx]; simp
    match h_sl : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp at h_head_eq
    | y :: ys =>
      simp at h_head_eq; subst x
      simp [dropWhile, hp]

have tail_comm : ∀ s, fromSL (tailSL s) = (fromSL s).tail := by
    intro s
    have ⟨l, r, ok⟩ := s
    unfold tailSL
    simp
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · subst l
      simp [fromSL]
      cases r with | nil => simp | cons y ys => simp [fromSL, nil]
    · simp [fromSL]
      rcases l with _|⟨a, as⟩ <;> simp at h2 ⊢
      cases as <;> simp at h2
      simp
      generalize hL : r.reverse = L
      unfold splitInTwoSL fromSL
      simp
      show (List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo ⟨L, rfl⟩).1.val ++
           (List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo ⟨L, rfl⟩).2.val.reverse.reverse = L
      simp
      exact List.take_append_drop _ L
    · simp [fromSL]
      cases l <;> simp
  have head_comm : ∀ s x, headSL s = some x → (fromSL s).head? = some x := by
    intro s x h
    unfold headSL at h
    split at h <;> simp at h
    · contradiction
    · rename_i l r ok _ _ _
      subst x
      simp [fromSL]
      cases l <;> simp at *
      simp at ok
      cases ok.1 rfl with | inl h => simp [h] | inr h =>
        cases r with | nil => contradiction | cons y ys =>
          cases ys <;> simp at h ⊢
    · rename_i l r ok _ _
      subst x
      simp [fromSL]
      cases l <;> simp at *
  induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h_empty]
    cases sl with | mk l r ok =>
    simp at h_empty
    cases h_empty with | intro h1 h2 =>
    subst l; simp at h2; subst r
    simp [fromSL, dropWhile, nil]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst sl
    simp [fromSL, dropWhile, nil]
  | case3 sl h_ne hsl h_some hp ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h_ne, h_some, hp]
    rw [ih]
    have heq := head_comm sl hsl h_some
    cases hL : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hL] at heq
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [hL] at heq
      subst x
      conv => lhs; simp [dropWhile, hp]
      rw [tail_comm, hL]
      rfl
  | case4 sl h_ne hsl h_some hnp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]
    simp [h_ne, h_some, hnp]
    have heq := head_comm sl hsl h_some
    cases hL : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hL] at heq
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [hL] at heq
      subst x
      conv => lhs; simp [dropWhile, hnp]
      rw [hL]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty]
    have : sl = nil := by
      cases sl; simp [nil] at *; exact h_empty
    subst this
    simp [fromSL]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil]
  | case3 sl hsl h_ne h_head h_p ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_head, h_p]
    rw [←ih]
    have h_head_eq : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_head ⊢
      split at h_head <;> simp_all
    have h_tail_eq : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      cases sl with | mk xs ys ok =>
      dsimp [tailSL]
      split_ifs with h1 h2
      · simp [fromSL]; simp at h1; subst h1
        have := ok.1 rfl; cases this <;> simp_all
      · simp [fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
        rw [List.reverse_reverse, List.take_append_drop]
      · cases xs <;> simp [fromSL] at *
    match h_l : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h_l] at h_head_eq; contradiction
    | x :: xs =>
      rw [h_l] at h_head_eq; simp at h_head_eq; subst x
      rw [dropWhile, h_tail_eq, h_l]
      simp [h_p]
  | case4 sl hsl h_ne h_head h_p =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_head, h_p]
    have h_head_eq : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_head ⊢
      split at h_head <;> simp_all
    match h_l : fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h_l] at h_head_eq; contradiction
    | x :: xs =>
      rw [h_l] at h_head_eq; simp at h_head_eq; subst x
      rw [dropWhile]
      simp [h_p]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h_empty =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_empty, fromSL, dropWhile]
    have ⟨_, _, _⟩ := sl; simp at h_empty; simp [h_empty.1, h_empty.2]
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none; subst h_none
    simp [dropWhileSL, nil, fromSL]
  | case3 sl h_ne hsl h_some h_p ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h_some]; simp [h_ne, h_p]; rw [←ih]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_some ⊢
      cases xs <;> simp_all; cases ys <;> simp_all
    have h_tail : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      cases xs <;> simp [tailSL, fromSL]
      · cases ys <;> simp
        simp at ok; cases ok.1 <;> simp_all
      · rename_i x xs'; cases xs' <;> simp [splitInTwoSL]
    rw [h_tail]
    cases h_sl : fromSL sl <;> simp_all [dropWhile, h_p]
  | case4 sl h_ne hsl h_some h_np =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h_some]; simp [h_ne, h_np]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
      simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_some ⊢
      cases xs <;> simp_all; cases ys <;> simp_all
    cases h_sl : fromSL sl <;> simp_all [dropWhile, h_np]

cases sl; simp [fromSL] at *; simp_all
  | case2 sl h =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h; subst h
    simp [fromSL, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl x h px ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h, px]
    rw [←ih]
    have : fromSL sl = x :: (fromSL sl).tail := by
      cases sl; unfold headSL fromSL at *
      split at h <;> simp_all <;> subst h <;> simp
    rw [this]; simp [dropWhile, px]
    congr 1
    cases sl with | mk lhs rhs ok =>
    simp [tailSL, fromSL]
    split
    · simp [nil]; cases rhs <;> simp; rename_i _ ys; cases ys <;> simp at ok ⊢
    · simp
      split
      · simp [splitInTwoSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo]
      · rfl
  | case4 sl x h npx =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h, npx]
    have : fromSL sl = x :: (fromSL sl).tail := by
      cases sl; unfold headSL fromSL at *
      split at h <;> simp_all <;> subst h <;> simp
    rw [this]; simp [dropWhile, npx]

| case4 sl h_not hsl h_some hnp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h_some]; simp [h_not, hnp]
    have : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; unfold headSL at h_some; unfold fromSL
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
    match h: fromSL sl with
    | [] => rw [h] at *; contradiction
    | y::ys => simp at *; subst y; simp [dropWhile, hnp]

cases lhs <;> simp_all
    · simp [fromSL]; cases lhs <;> simp_all

· simp at h_some; subst hsl
      simp [fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, hnp]

rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none
    subst h_none
    simp [fromSL, nil, dropWhile]
  | case3 sl h_ne x h_some hp ih =>
    simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, hp]
    rw [← ih]
    have h_tail : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      rcases sl with ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        cases ys with
        | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
        | cons b bs => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil] at *; simp [ok]
      | cons a as =>
        induction ys generalizing as with
        | nil =>
           by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        | cons b bs ih_ys =>
           by_cases h : as = []
           · simp [h, List.tail, fromSL] at ih_ys
             simp [h, tailSL, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
           · simp [h, tailSL, fromSL]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
      simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_some ⊢
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
    have h_not_nil : fromSL sl ≠ [] := by
      intro h; rw [h] at h_head; simp at h_head
    have h_cons : fromSL sl = x :: (fromSL sl).tail := by
      rw [← List.head_eq_head? h_not_nil] at h_head
      rw [← h_head, List.head_cons_tail]
      exact h_not_nil
    rw [h_cons]
    conv_lhs => unfold dropWhile
    simp [hp, h_tail]
  | case4 sl h_ne x h_some hnp =>
    simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, hnp]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
      simp [headSL, fromSL] at h_some ⊢
      split at h_some <;> simp_all
    have h_not_nil : fromSL sl ≠ [] := by
      intro h; rw [h] at h_head; simp at h_head
    have h_cons : fromSL sl = x :: (fromSL sl).tail := by
      rw [← List.head_eq_head? h_not_nil] at h_head
      rw [← h_head, List.head_cons_tail]
      exact h_not_nil
    rw [h_cons]
    conv_lhs => unfold dropWhile
    simp [hnp]

rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
    simp [fromSL]; simp at h_empty
    rw [h_empty.1, h_empty.2]; rfl
  | case2 sl h_ne h_none =>
    simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_none]
    rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h_none; subst h_none
    rfl
  | case3 sl h_ne x h_some h_p ih =>
    simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, h_p]
    rw [←ih]
    congr 1
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      unfold headSL fromSL at *; rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
      cases lhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢
      cases rhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢; exact h_some
    have h_tail : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
      rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
      unfold tailSL; simp; split_ifs with h_nil
      · simp [fromSL, nil]
        cases rhs with | nil => rfl | cons y ys => simp at ok; cases ys <;> simp at ok; rfl
      · split_ifs with h_single
        · simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
          have : (List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo ⟨rhs.reverse, rfl⟩).1.val ++ 
                 (List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo ⟨rhs.reverse, rfl⟩).2.val.reverse = rhs.reverse := 
             List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo_spec _
          rw [this]
          cases lhs with | nil => contradiction | cons a as => simp; cases as; rfl; simp at h_single
        · simp [fromSL]; cases lhs; contradiction; simp; rfl
    rw [h_tail, ←List.head?_eq_head _ h_head]
    cases (fromSL sl) <;> simp at h_head ⊢
  | case4 sl h_ne x h_some h_np =>
    simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, h_ne, h_some, h_np]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some x := by
      unfold headSL fromSL at *; rcases sl with ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
      cases lhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢
      cases rhs <;> simp at h_some ⊢; exact h_some
    rw [←List.head?_eq_head _ h_head]
    cases (fromSL sl) <;> simp at h_head ⊢; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, h_np]
